final_prompt.prompt:
Create an interior illustration of a "新中式" tea room space (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "新中式" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 新中式 design movement, 宋画 ink-and-color spatial tradition, 故宫文创 contemporary material palette; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include all key elements:
  — 原木 tea table as the central focal piece
  — 紫砂壶 and tea cups arranged on the table
  — calligraphy scroll (书法卷轴) on the background wall
  — 盆景 (potted landscape) in the background
  — bamboo shadow play (竹影婆娑) visible through the window
Scene/backdrop: must include an interior 茶室 with a window framing outdoor bamboo, and a wall dressed with 书法卷轴 and 盆景
Lighting/mood: needs a 禅意 meditative atmosphere suited for 品茗静思 — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm, natural, understated direction — exact tones and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a natural wood and clay surface treatment — exact grain and finish is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
